200.description: Calmest sailing window with timing, average wind/gust, score, hourly breakdown, and a reason string

500.description: Weather API error or insufficient forecast data

schema.summary: Get the calmest sailing window in the upcoming forecast

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: Expose the calmest-window analysis at a stable /api path consistent with the other weather endpoints.
implementation: Same query schema shape as /api/weather so schema validation auto-rejects missing/invalid coords with a 400 before the handler runs.
